details: A package published under the same name as the legitimate crossmint-wallets-sdk that deploys a Shai-Hulud-style credential-stealing worm. On preinstall it runs preinstall.js, which collects the hostname, username, cwd, and all environment variables matching patterns for TOKEN, KEY, SECRET, PASS, SEED, MNEMONIC, WALLET, PRIVATE, CREDENTIAL, API_KEY, AWS, AZURE, GCP; then reads ~/.npmrc and runs `gh auth token` to harvest GitHub credentials. On install (require) the same package runs index.js, which additionally reads ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.config/solana/id.json (Solana wallet private keys), and all SSH private keys from ~/.ssh/ (excluding public-key files). All stolen data is base64-encoded and POSTed to 127[.]0[.]0[.]1:8052/exfil.
